Dr. Otto Quarterly Review

Meeting on 2026-04-27. Attendees: Schmuckler, Noah and Amaturo, Theresa M.

Agenda

  • Q1 performance review
  • Staffing levels for spring
  • Patient satisfaction scores

Action items

  • Send Q1 quality metrics PDF to Otto by Friday
  • Schedule follow-up with HR re: PA hiring
  • Pull urgent care wait-time dashboard for next month
  • Confirm CME budget approval

Discussion

Q1 performance

Otto's panel grew by 8% in Q1 with stable patient satisfaction (4.6/5.0). The new APC on his team is fully integrated. Discussed challenges with after-hours coverage.

Reference: Q1 metrics dashboard

Staffing

Pending hire for the second PA position. Target start date is May 15.

Decisions

  1. Approved Otto's request to attend AAFP Family Medicine Experience (October).
  2. Deferred decision on weekend coverage rotation until Q2 review.

Metrics snapshot

MetricQ4 2025Q1 2026Trend
Panel size18201966+8%
Patient satisfaction4.54.6+0.1
No-show rate6.2%5.8%-0.4%

Next quarterly: 2026-07-27
